title: NAAC Accreditation Expiring
message: NAAC accreditation expires March 2025 — renewal process must begin immediately.

title: AICTE Annual Report Pending
message: 2023-24 annual report has not been uploaded to the AICTE portal.

title: Faculty:Student Ratio
message: Current ratio is 1:18, exceeding AICTE norm of 1:15. Recruitment needed.
